title: Sumerian/Akkadian: The Underworld Vision of an Assyrian Prince
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: The Underworld Vision of an Assyrian Prince.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: The Underworld Vision of an Assyrian Prince.

translation.text: From 'The Underworld Vision of an Assyrian Prince': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
